metadata.name: Report from a Natural Disaster Zone

description: A reporter is sent to cover a hurricane's aftermath. They must report on the damage and the human impact while dealing with difficult conditions.

nodes.task_description: Travel to the affected area and establish a safe base of operations.
Interview affected residents, first responders, and officials to gather personal stories and official information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers a mix of anecdotal and official information.

nodes.task_description: Capture photos and videos of the damage to provide visual context.
File stories back to the newsroom using a satellite phone or other backup communication method due to likely power outages.

expected_outcome.value: Stories are successfully filed despite infrastructure challenges.
